title: Self-describing proof envelope with named public signals

artifacts.description: BolyraEnvelope type, encode(), decode(), and fromRaw() helpers for TS SDK
Per-circuit signal name maps: HumanUniqueness, AgentPolicy, Delegation — maps positional index to named field
Re-export BolyraEnvelope, encode, decode, fromRaw from public API
Python dataclass BolyraEnvelope with encode/decode (JSON-serialisable) and from_raw() migration helper
Python dict-of-dicts: circuit -> positional index -> field name, mirrors TS signal maps
Canonical schema: version, circuit, provingSystem, signals object, proof object — wire format spec with field semantics
Unit tests: round-trip encode/decode, fromRaw for all three circuits, unknown-circuit rejection, version mismatch error
Python pytest: round-trip, from_raw, JSON serialisation, error cases
Add migration section: fromRaw() usage, before/after example replacing publicSignals[0] with signals.humanMerkleRoot

steps: Define the BolyraEnvelope wire schema in spec/proof-envelope-v1.md: version string (semver), circuit enum (HumanUniqueness|AgentPolicy|Delegation), provingSystem enum (groth16|plonk), signals record keyed by name, proof object passthrough
Create sdk/src/signals.ts: export SIGNAL_MAPS constant mapping each circuit to an ordered array of field names drawn from circuit public output order in the .circom source
Implement encode(circuit, provingSystem, rawProof, rawSignals): BolyraEnvelope in sdk/src/envelope.ts — zips rawSignals array with SIGNAL_MAPS[circuit] into a named-field record
Implement decode(envelope): { proof, publicSignals } in sdk/src/envelope.ts — inverts the zip back to positional bigint[] for downstream verifyProof calls
Implement fromRaw(circuit, provingSystem, rawProof, rawSignals): BolyraEnvelope as a convenience alias for encode() — entry point for migrating existing callers
Add version validation in decode(): throw a descriptive error if envelope.version is not a recognised schema version
Wire encode/decode/fromRaw into existing proveHandshake and verifyHandshake so returned proof objects are envelopes by default; keep a rawOutput option flag for backward compat
Mirror signal maps and dataclass in sdk-python/bolyra/signals.py and sdk-python/bolyra/envelope.py; serialise/deserialise via standard json with int coercion for bigints
Write sdk/test/envelope.test.ts covering: encode then decode is identity, fromRaw produces correct field names for each circuit, wrong circuit name throws, version mismatch in decode throws
Write sdk-python/tests/test_envelope.py with equivalent coverage plus JSON round-trip test
Update sdk/QUICKSTART.md with migration guide: show old positional access pattern vs new named-field pattern, and fromRaw() one-liner for existing integrators
Bump sdk package version to 0.3.0 (minor — public API addition), update CHANGELOG
